content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Extend to Palindrome". Refer to LeetCode description: https://www.spoj.com/problems/EPALIN/
constraints: S contains only lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each test case consists of a string S.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of characters that need to be added to the string to make it a palindrome.

code.Python3:
T = int(input())
for _ in range(T):
    S = input()
    i, j = 0, len(S) - 1
    count = 0
    while i < j:
        if S[i] != S[j]: count += 1
        i += 1; j -= 1
    print(count)
